name: @forgeax/hello-room
description: feat-20260511-asset-system-v1 M7 convergence app - 3 mesh (box root + sphere child + plane child) + texture + hierarchy + dual-shading MeshRenderer (Unlit + Standard via MaterialAsset.shadingModel) + Camera + DirectionalLight. End-to-end proof of charter proposition 5 consistent abstraction spanning types / runtime / material / shader / smoke.

forgeax._comment: smokeInvocation = hello-room SSOT for AC-05 / AC-17 / AC-25 (feat-20260511-asset-system-v1 D-P7 + AGENTS.md Smoke gate four-command expansion). Literal `pnpm --filter @forgeax/hello-room smoke` must match byte-for-byte across apps/hello/room/package.json#forgeax.smokeInvocation + .github/workflows/ci.yml + .claude/skills/forgeax-step-verify/SKILL.md + AGENTS.md#Smoke-gate. Each app still owns its own SSOT (K-12 stance preserved per-app; hello-triangle / hello-cube keep their own invocations).

bundle-size.reason: vite app bundle (dist/assets) shape is downstream of @forgeax/engine-runtime + @forgeax/engine-rhi-webgpu sizes already tracked at the package level

fps.reason: hello-triangle baseline anchor only; hello-room smoke covers 300-frame multi-mesh GPU path (AC-05)

bench.reason: convergence integration app; bench focus stays on @forgeax/engine-math + @forgeax/engine-ecs

spike-report.reason: not a spike app; dual-impl texture spike lives in apps/dual-impl-spike (M6 texture-4x4 cell)
